operation: Insert 608ZZ bearing into base pocket and verify slip fit.
Install carrier journal through bearing and confirm free carrier rotation.
Fasten fixed internal ring to the four base standoffs.
Install orbit/escape shaft and orbit pinion in the carrier two-point support.
Install hand crank shaft, retained pinion, and knob.
Install balance, escape wheel, and pallet visual module on carrier seats.
Rotate hand crank slowly and inspect carrier/orbit/escapement motion.
